basics.name: Dinh Van Tai
basics.label: Intern Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: I am an aspiring Full Stack Developer Intern who enjoys exploring new technologies and continuously learning. I am seeking an opportunity to strengthen my front-end and back-end skills while gaining hands-on experience in a professional environment.

work.name: Gung Wedding Planner
work.summary: Developed and maintained a wedding planning web platform using React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Node/Express, and MongoDB; collaborated with the team to deliver new features and fix bugs.
highlights: I handled most of the backend and DevOps work (API design, data handling, Docker deployment), and supported some frontend tasks with React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS when needed.
responsibilities: Designed and maintained REST APIs for authentication, content, contacts, and file uploads in Node/Express.
Modeled MongoDB schemas with Mongoose and enforced data validation and security rules.
Built the image upload and processing pipeline (Multer, Sharp, WebP optimization).
Containerized services with Docker/Docker Compose and managed environment configuration.
Assisted with frontend components and pages using React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS.

work.name: Tài API
work.summary: Self-hosted and operated an AI API gateway based on the open-source QuantumNous/new-api project to provide large language model access for developers building AI-enabled products.
highlights: Used the platform to expose LLM APIs that developers can integrate into their own applications and internal project workflows.
responsibilities: Deployed and maintained the open-source New API service as a self-hosted gateway for large language model access.
Provided API-based access to hosted language models so developers could integrate AI capabilities into products and software projects.
Managed the service as practical infrastructure for experimentation, integration, and AI feature delivery.

projects.name: CV
projects.description: My current personal CV website, built to present my profile, experience, projects, and achievements in a clean single-page format.
highlights: Built with Astro and TailwindCSS, with a responsive layout optimized for both web viewing and printable CV output.
Uses structured CV data from JSON so content like experience, education, awards, and projects can be updated quickly in one place.

projects.name: NewsFlow
projects.description: A team project focused on personalized RSS-based news curation for people who need fast updates tailored to their work and interests.
highlights: Proposed the product idea and led the project direction around RSS source configuration and personalized content delivery.
Designed to help investors, KOLs, and content creators track relevant market and breaking-news signals without reading every news site manually.

projects.name: e-hutech
projects.description: A personal learning project built from HTTP capture experiments on the e-hutech mobile app to understand and reuse HUTECH API endpoints.
highlights: Explored API request-response flows, data processing patterns, and reverse-engineered endpoint usage for practical backend learning.
Used Python to build a Telegram bot and worked with PostgreSQL and Redis to manage and process collected data.

projects.name: e-hutech-scios
projects.description: A follow-up project that extends the earlier API research into iOS Shortcuts to automate e-hutech-related workflows on mobile.
highlights: Shifted the delivery approach from a Telegram bot to iOS Shortcuts to learn native shortcut actions and mobile-first automation design.
Built as hands-on preparation for future iOS application development and for integrating productivity shortcuts around app usage.
